name: Product Search Exploit
description: An e-commerce product search is vulnerable to UNION-based SQL injection. Extract the flag from a hidden database table.
briefing: During a security assessment of ByteMart, an online electronics store, you've found that the product search feature may be vulnerable to SQL injection. Intelligence suggests a hidden database table contains sensitive data, including a flag. Use UNION-based injection techniques to determine the database structure and extract the flag.
objective: Use UNION-based SQL injection on the product search to discover and extract the flag from a hidden table in the database.
author: h4ck0rman
